sources_checked.limitation: Landing page linking to 4 PDF menus (Lunch, Dinner, Drink, Dessert); address on page matches (7 Saint Mark's Place, New York, NY 10003).
PDF text extraction flattened layout; GF/VG icon markers could not be reliably mapped to specific dishes so were not relied upon for allergen determinations.
PDF text extraction jumbled column order for lunch special protein/noodle/curry options; reconstructed via adjacency, treated as best-effort.
Prices listed separately from dish names at bottom of extraction; matched sequentially, approximate mapping.

manual_review_reason: Lunch menu PDF text extraction had jumbled column ordering for the lunch-special protein/noodle/curry option groupings; dish-to-description mapping in dinner and dessert menus is reconstructed from adjacency in flattened PDF text and should be spot-checked against the visual PDF layout. Panang Curry and Massaman Curry appear without explicit ingredient lists in some spots.
